channel.title: NAAD Davidson, MK Williamson, S Lewis, D Shoemark, MW Carroll, KJ Heesom, M Zambon, J Ellis, PA Lewis, JA Hiscox, DA Matthews | PlatCOVID

item.title: Characterisation of the transcriptome and proteome of SARS-CoV-2 reveals a cell passage induced in-frame deletion of the furin-like cleavage site from the spike glycoprotein.
